title: Mailchimp vs Postmark (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Mailchimp vs Postmark: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Mailchimp and Postmark comes down to your specific use case. Mailchimp is built for beginners and small businesses, while Postmark targets developers who need fast, reliable transactional email.

comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Who Need Fast, Reliable Transactional Email

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on beginners and small businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers who need fast, reliable transactional email

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Mailchimp wins for beginners and small businesses, while Postmark is stronger for developers who need fast, reliable transactional email.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Postmark?
faq.a: Mailchimp starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Postmark to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
